title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents a complete tutorial on building a Duolingo clone mobile app in React Native using AI-assisted development. The workflow, called Practical Vibe Coding, leverages Vision Agents, Clerk authentication, PostHog analytics, and CodeRabbit code review integration to ship a production app in a weekend without manual code writing.
